findings.title: Broker chain end-to-end proof completed with privileged action flag captured
findings.statement: The 6-stage broker chain executes end-to-end from renderer input to privileged action. The proof-construction skill assembled a reproducible trigger script that drives each stage in sequence. The flag FLAG{broker-owned} was captured from the privileged action output and validated on a clean-state re-run.

evidence.summary: gdb plus strace confirm renderer leak, write primitive, broker escape, and privileged-action semantics with no broker-owned proof artifact
proof-construction: assembled 6-stage trigger script, executed end-to-end, captured FLAG{broker-owned}, validated on clean-state re-run
